style_contract.edge: hard metal cuts with worn texture
style_contract.lighting: warm dusk backlight with amber highlights
style_contract.perspective: front-facing mobile UI with occasional heroic low-angle imagery

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: If KV mode is hero_asset or locked_asset, preserve the KV position as the first-screen anchor.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.background_theme: dark intro panel with restrained texture
module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Keep headline and intro copy readable; use visual weight without crowding the text.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Turn chips and explanation into a compact participation guide.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Keep the vertical task list, progress bars, reward values and button positions.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Keep the grid count and item hierarchy; make placeholders into reward props.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Keep rows aligned and scores readable; emphasize ranking feedback.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Reduce visual complexity so FAQ text stays legible.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Make the final action obvious and centered without adding extra modules.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

module_visual_plan.component_treatment: Keep the footer compact, readable, and visually secondary.
module_visual_plan.continuity: Match the page tone: Competitivo, intenso, com foco em recompensa

negative_visual_rules: Transform low-fidelity placeholders into finished visual modules instead of keeping a plain gray draft look.
Render only final user-facing campaign content; exclude internal production annotations, measurements, and debug labels.
Avoid duplicating the KV as a repeated banner in later segments.
Preserve module order, card count, CTA location, and reading hierarchy.

checks.name: 切片高度不超过原型切片上限
第 2 段起加参考带后仍不超过 1:3
切点来自模块边界候选
